text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 90 

PRVDR_ENRLMT_MTHD_CD 

LABEL: Provider Medicaid or CHIP Program Enrollment Method Code 

DESCRIPTION: Process by which a provider was enrolled in Medicaid or CHIP. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_MTHD_CD 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_MTHD_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR enrollment 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1 = Enrolled through use of Medicare
